标题: Stonelsland Stone Island arm embroidered knit sweater, featuring double-layer soft leather arm embroidery with embroidered logo on the front as a brand accent. Paired with laser-engraved metal buttons. The garment is washed, color-fixed, shape-fixed, and wool impurities removed. This design is woven on a 7-gauge imported machine, with a knitted rib technique at the neckline and hem, and arm embroidery for brand visual appeal. Sizes: S-XL S: Chest 112, Shoulder 46, Length 68 M: Chest 116, Shoulder 47, Length 70 L: Chest 120, Shoulder 48, Length 72 XL: Chest 124, Shoulder 49, Length 74.

Stonelsland Stone Island Badge Denim Jacket, custom-made with high-density twill denim, rich texture, and comfortable to wear. Featuring classic indigo denim as the main tone, blending vintage charm with modern fashion. The front chest pocket is proportionally designed for practicality, with the iconic Stonelsland badge embellished on the sleeve like a unique medal, showcasing the brand's identity. The clean lines outline a sleek silhouette, exuding a casual and stylish look. Infused with workwear genes and luxury DNA, it combines simplicity and versatility. The jacket is embroidered using advanced computer-controlled systems and precise mechanical components, ensuring high precision and smooth lines. The garment is stone washed to remove stains and achieve a slight fade, followed by snow wash for a more uniform color. The stitching is seamless and neat, with straight and delicate seams, comfortable and soft fabric, consistent color without color difference, suitable for creating fashionable styles and suitable for various occasions. Customized accessories, complete with three labels, available in unisex sizes S-XL. Size details: S - Chest 110cm, Shoulder 47.5cm, Length 65cm; M - Chest 114cm, Shoulder 49.5cm, Length 66.5cm; L - Chest 118cm, Shoulder 51.5cm, Length 68cm; XL - Chest 122cm, Shoulder 53.5cm, Length 69.5cm.

Dior x Stone Island embroidered sweatshirt, featuring custom plush satin fabric that is soft, delicate, and comfortable. Embellished with matching DIOR AND STONE ISLAND embroidery on the front, with Stone Island's classic star emblem resembling a crown jewel, complementing the Dior logo. The garment is finished with a valley wave texture process, enhancing the three-dimensional effect. The fabric is washed for a superior feel, ensuring durability, shape retention, and colorfastness. Available in sizes S, M, L, XL.
